scene.scenePrompt: Night study, flickering candlelight casting tall shadows, ancient glowing symbols on walls. Medium close-up of Zhao Qian standing at broken door, pistol aimed at camera, eyes fixed forward with fierce intensity, lips slightly parted mid-speech. Flame leaps high in foreground, illuminating his sharp profile. Gold and emerald geometric lines intersect across deep dark blue background, abstract minimalist line-art style. Power dynamic, tense confrontation, cold amber light.

beats.narration: The candle flame suddenly flares up, its fiery tongue licking the bookshelf as the ancient characters on the wall twist like living things. The door is kicked open, and three men in black burst in. The leader points a handgun directly at you.
beats.speaker: Zhao Qian
beats.lineDelivery: Cold, sharp, and decisive, carrying an unquestionable sense of pressure, his voice echoing in the cramped study

activeCharacters.name: Zhao Qian
activeCharacters.pose: Standing at the doorway, pointing his gun straight at you with a sharp, piercing gaze

activeCharacters.name: Ma Chao
activeCharacters.pose: Holding a stun baton in his left hand, his right hand resting on his waist, scanning the room warily

activeCharacters.name: Li Qiang
activeCharacters.pose: Holding a folding knife, shielding the doorframe with his body, his gaze fierce

beats.narration: Your heart beats like a drum, and your throat feels constricted, unable to squeeze out a single word. The ancient book is right at your fingertips, the candlelight reflecting off the twisted symbols on its cover. You have only 0.5 seconds to react.

activeCharacters.name: Zhao Qian
activeCharacters.pose: Lowering his gun slightly to aim at your chest, his brow furrowed

activeCharacters.name: Ma Chao
activeCharacters.pose: Taking a step forward, his stun baton crackling with electricity

activeCharacters.name: Li Qiang
activeCharacters.pose: Facing sideways to watch the window, holding his folding knife in a reverse grip

choices.label: Grab the ancient book and hurl it at the candlestick

effect.nextSceneSeed: The flames instantly erupt, engulfing the study in a sea of fire. You rush toward the window amidst the chaos, Zhao Qian's roar echoing behind you.

beats.narration: You slowly raise your hands, keeping your eyes locked on Zhao Qian. Ma Chao steps forward and snatches the ancient book, and the candle flame dims. Zhao Qian sneers and flips through the pages, but his expression suddenly changes—a line of glowing words appears on the paper. He slams the book shut and barks, 'Take him!' Li Qiang twists your arm behind your back and escorts you out the door.

activeCharacters.name: Zhao Qian
activeCharacters.pose: Clutching the ancient book tightly, his eyes filled with shock and suspicion as he gestures for his men to move

activeCharacters.name: Ma Chao
activeCharacters.pose: Sheathing his stun baton, reaching out to grab your shoulder

activeCharacters.name: Li Qiang
activeCharacters.pose: Twisting your arm, forcing you to walk out

characters.name: Zhao Qian
characters.voiceDescription: Male, around 25-30 years old. His voice is steady, magnetic, and slightly raspy. He is calm, confident, and calculating. He speaks at a medium-to-slow pace with clear articulation in standard Mandarin, his calm tone hiding a sense of danger and control.
characters.visualDescription: Young adult male, early 30s, short dark hair, deep-set intense eyes with a hint of mystery, sharp angular jawline, clean-shaven, minimalist modern attire: fitted dark blue suit jacket with gold geometric line embroidery and emerald green accents, abstract geometric poster layout, vertical composition, integrated with intersecting gold circles and emerald green shapes on deep dark blue background, elegant sophisticated demeanor

characters.name: Ma Chao
characters.voiceDescription: Male, early 20s (around 25). His voice is deep, magnetic, and has a cool, metallic quality. He is reserved and steady but hides a sharp edge. He speaks at a measured pace with clear articulation in standard Mandarin, carrying a confident and elegant tone with occasional meaningful pauses.
characters.visualDescription: male, mid-20s, minimalist line-art profile, short tousled dark hair, sharp angular jawline, intense deep-set eyes with a composed gaze, elegant high cheekbones, thin lips, wearing a sleek dark high-collared jacket with subtle gold geometric patterns and emerald green cuffs, clean abstract design, overall aura of quiet confidence and mystery.

characters.name: Li Qiang
characters.voiceDescription: Male, around 25 years old. His voice is steady, magnetic, and slightly raspy, blending calm rationality with a passion for exploration. He speaks at a moderate pace with clear pronunciation in standard Mandarin, pausing at key moments to emphasize the depth of his thoughts.
characters.visualDescription: 20s male, short black hair slicked back, piercing dark eyes with intense focus, sharp jawline, angular facial features, wears a deep navy blue trench coat with gold geometric line trim, emerald green shirt with abstract golden circle pattern at collar, minimalist line-art silhouette integrated with intersecting gold circles and emerald shapes, elegant clean abstract design, aristocratic intellectual aura

storyState.logline: A designer discovers that words can trigger real-world power. After piecing together a line of poetry that ignites a candle, he is hunted by a mysterious organization—only to realize he has touched the key to rewriting the blueprint of the world.
storyState.genreTags: Fantasy / Mystery / Urban Fantasy / Fast-Paced Reversals
storyState.protagonist: You are an independent designer who found an ancient book in a second-hand bookstore, only to discover that the arrangement of its fonts causes anomalous phenomena. Having just pieced together a line of poetry that lit a candle, you see shadows approaching outside the window. You want to unlock the secrets of the ancient book, but your weakness is that you suffer from aphasia, making you unable to describe what you see to others.
storyState.synopsis: In a late-night study, after a candle spontaneously ignites, three men in black burst in, led by Zhao Qian, who demands you hand over the ancient book. You face a choice: surrender or resist. If you surrender, glowing words appear on the book, and you are taken away; if you throw the book, the flames cause chaos, allowing you to escape through the window. This is the beginning of the activation of the taboo power of words.
openThreads: Why are you the only one who can clearly see the fonts in the ancient book? What exactly did that line of poetry awaken?
What organization does Zhao Qian represent? How did they track you down?
If you choose to throw the book, are there more clues hidden within the flames?
Lin Mo flashes by in the distance—is he friend or foe?
storyState.nextHook: Next Scene: Escorted to an abandoned factory on a rainy night, you will face Zhao Qian's interrogation, or escape alone after the fire to search for Lin Mo's whereabouts.

cardTitle: A Song of Ink and Fire
worldSetting:
This is an AI-interactive story game targeted at a [Male-oriented] audience, featuring intense dramatic conflicts and rapid reversals in the style of Hongguo short videos.
Plot Style: Multi-branch twists. Pacing: Fast-paced and thrilling.
Opening setting of the featured story 'A Song of Ink and Fire': A designer discovers that words arranged in a specific font within an ancient book can trigger real-world phenomena. He pieces together a line of poetry, which ignites a candle on his desk. A battle for the power of words begins, and the ultimate 'text' seems to be written on the blueprint of the world itself.
Please dive straight into this opening to give the player a strong sense of immersion and excitement. Subsequent branches should maintain the reversal density of a micro-drama, ensuring players see immediate consequences for every choice they make.
styleGuide: Abstract geometric poster layout, vertical composition. A minimalist line-art profile of a handsome male face integrated with intersecting gold circles and emerald green shapes on a deep dark blue background. Elegant, clean abstract design.
